text: Planning a trip always excites me, from choosing the destination to booking accommodation. Once I arrive, experiencing new cultures is the highlight—visiting local markets or learning about traditions. Trying unfamiliar food often becomes an adventure; sometimes it’s delicious, other times surprising. Language barriers can be tricky, but a smile and simple words usually help. Once, I accidentally ordered a strange dish because I misread the menu, but it turned into a funny memory. These moments, both smooth and challenging, create lasting memories that make every journey unforgettable.
